dialogues.text: (Week 2 already... Nana-chan seems to be getting used to this)
(Today she even said 'Please take care of me' on her own...)
(That defenseless figure of hers... it's irresistible...)
(I want to try more daring treatments, but... maybe it's still too soon)
(But at this pace, the debt repayment is...)
(I took out a loan to realize my dream of an erotic massage clinic, but Nana-chan is my only client...)
(Still, just having Nana-chan come to visit... honestly makes me happy)
(Those pure reactions of hers... I want to see more different reactions...)
(The debt... well, I'll figure something out!)
(For now, I need to do something this week...!)
